text: Ever wondered why your blood type matters? It’s more than just a letter. Blood types are determined by genetics, influenced by our parents’ genes. But it’s not just simple inheritance. A, B, AB, and O types can mix and match! Research shows blood types can affect disease risk and transfusion compatibility. But here’s the twist: scientists are still uncovering the full story! So, your blood type could shape more than you think. It’s a genetic puzzle! Want to dive deeper into blood type mysteries? Hit follow for more science insights!
